turns.content:
Review source files for bugs, security issues, and code quality problems. Focus on recent changes related to the execute-slash-command tool and its supporting modules.

Files to review:
- src/tools/session/execute-slash-command.ts
- src/tools/session/resolve-command.ts
- src/tools/session/dispatch-command.ts
- src/tools/session/semantic-agent-selector.ts
- src/tools/session/validate-command.ts
- src/tools/session/workflow-parser.ts

Focus on:
1. TUI dispatch path (clearPrompt → appendPrompt → submitPrompt)
2. Command resolution flow (exact → fuzzy → substring → semantic)
3. Agent selection flow (keyword matching, createTuiPrompt)
4. Subtask dispatch via session.prompt()
5. Error handling in all paths
6. Any security issues or crash vectors

Produce REVIEW.md with severity-classified findings.
